nasb.text: So all Israel was enrolled by genealogies; and behold, they are written in the Book of the Kings of Israel. And Judah was carried away into exile to Babylon for their unfaithfulness.

esv.text: So all Israel was recorded in genealogies, and these are written in the Book of the Kings of Israel. And Judah was taken into exile in Babylon because of their breach of faith.

cnv.text: 全體以色列人都照著家譜登記，都寫在“以色列諸王記”上；猶大人因為悖逆，就被擄到巴比倫去。

ccb.text: 所有以色列人都按照谱系记在以色列的列王史上。 犹大人因为犯罪而被掳到了巴比伦。
